summary.en: Hera is an AI motion designer that turns hours of After Effects work into minutes.
summary.zh: Hera 是一款 AI 動態設計師，把原本需數小時的 After Effects 工作縮短到幾分鐘完成。

highlight.en: After finding that 95% of motion-graphics time is manual button-clicking, Hera automates the tedious work while leaving full creative control to the user.
highlight.zh: Hera 發現動態圖形 95% 的時間都花在手動點按鈕上，因此自動化繁瑣步驟，同時把完整的創意掌控權留給使用者。

summary.en: Perspectives Health automates administrative work for behavioral health clinics.
summary.zh: Perspectives Health 為行為健康診所自動化處理行政工作。

highlight.en: It builds a suite of AI agents to take over documentation, compliance, audits, and utilization review, the tasks that consume half a behavioral health clinic's time and resources.
highlight.zh: 它打造一系列 AI 代理，接手文件記錄、法遵、稽核與使用率審查等工作，這些任務佔據了行為健康診所一半的時間與資源。

summary.en: Luminal makes AI models run fast on any hardware.
summary.zh: Luminal 讓 AI 模型在任何硬體上都能快速運行。

highlight.en: Luminal's ML framework and compiler generate GPU code that speeds up models 10x while simplifying deployment and cutting idle GPU costs.
highlight.zh: Luminal 的機器學習框架與編譯器能產生 GPU 程式碼，讓模型速度提升 10 倍，同時簡化部署並降低 GPU 閒置成本。

summary.en: Serafis provides narrative intelligence for investors by mining unstructured financial data.
summary.zh: Serafis 透過挖掘非結構化金融資料，為投資人提供敘事情報。

highlight.en: Serafis mines petabytes of unstructured data to spot narrative inflections before they become consensus, and is live with 12 organizations managing over $70B.
highlight.zh: Serafis 挖掘 PB 級的非結構化資料，在敘事轉折成為市場共識前先行捕捉，目前已服務 12 家管理逾 700 億美元資金的機構。

summary.en: Nixo is an operations platform built for forward deployed engineering teams.
summary.zh: Nixo 是專為前線部署工程師（FDE）團隊打造的營運平台。

highlight.en: Nixo connects customer conversations, engineering todos, and project delivery in one place to turn custom services work into repeatable, SaaS-margin leverage.
highlight.zh: Nixo 將客戶對話、工程待辦與專案交付整合於一處，把客製化服務工作轉化為可重複、具 SaaS 利潤率的槓桿。

summary.en: Pingo AI is an AI companion app that helps you learn languages through speaking.
summary.zh: Pingo AI 是一款透過口說幫你學語言的 AI 夥伴應用程式。

highlight.en: Pingo immerses learners in realistic dialogues with an AI tutor that sounds native, remembers their progress, and keeps them motivated like daily conversations.
highlight.zh: Pingo 讓學習者沉浸在擬真對話中，AI 導師發音如母語者，記得學習進度並持續激勵，宛如每天的閒聊。

summary.en: Golpo creates fully produced whiteboard explainer videos from a prompt or document.
summary.zh: Golpo 能從一句提示或一份文件，產生完整製作的白板講解影片。

highlight.en: Trusted by over 120,000 users, Golpo generates Khan Academy-style explainer videos in minutes and lets you edit every aspect afterward with just prompts.
highlight.zh: Golpo 已獲超過 12 萬名使用者採用，能在幾分鐘內產生類似可汗學院風格的講解影片，事後還能僅用提示詞編輯影片的各個面向。

summary.en: Shor is international payroll built for founders to hire and pay global teams fast.
summary.zh: Shor 是專為創辦人打造的國際薪資系統，讓你快速雇用並支付全球團隊。

highlight.en: Shor sets up in one call and runs payroll the same week, offering EOR with localized contracts, automatic compliance, and same-day local-currency payouts at a flat FX margin.
highlight.zh: Shor 一通電話即可設定、當週就能跑薪資，提供名義雇主（EOR）服務，包含在地化合約、自動法遵，以及採固定匯差的當日當地貨幣付款。

summary.en: Janet AI is an autonomous product management system built for modern teams.
summary.zh: Janet AI 是為現代團隊打造的自主產品管理系統。

highlight.en: Janet doesn't wait for manual work, acting as an autonomous product manager; it is backed by Y Combinator, Formosa Capital, and Paul Graham.
highlight.zh: Janet 不需等待人工操作，扮演自主的產品經理角色；其投資方包括 Y Combinator、Formosa Capital 與 Paul Graham。

summary.en: Lilac automatically monetizes idle GPUs from cloud providers and enterprises.
summary.zh: Lilac 自動將雲端供應商與企業的閒置 GPU 變現。

highlight.en: Lilac taps unused GPU capacity to give startups and researchers cheaper inference while letting companies earn from idle hardware, fully automated via Kubernetes.
highlight.zh: Lilac 取用閒置的 GPU 運算力，讓新創與研究者享有更便宜的推論成本，同時讓企業從閒置硬體獲利，並透過 Kubernetes 完全自動化。

summary.en: Imprezia is an advertising network built specifically for AI apps.
summary.zh: Imprezia 是專為 AI 應用程式打造的廣告聯播網。

highlight.en: Imprezia integrates contextual brands and products into AI apps in a way that enhances the user experience while generating revenue to cover inference bills.
highlight.zh: Imprezia 以提升使用者體驗的方式，把情境相關的品牌與產品整合進 AI 應用程式，同時創造營收來支付推論費用。

summary.en: Cocreate is video production software built to keep film professionals competitive.
summary.zh: Cocreate 是一款影片製作軟體，旨在讓影視專業人員保持競爭力。

highlight.en: Built alongside editors, DITs, and post supervisors, Cocreate targets production inefficiencies like lost footage, un-slated shots, and incoherent script notes.
highlight.zh: Cocreate 與剪輯師、DIT 和後期主管共同打造，鎖定製作流程中的低效問題，如遺失素材、未打板鏡頭與雜亂的場記筆記。

summary.en: Doe is a platform where AI agents do your work across your connected tools.
summary.zh: Doe 是一個讓 AI 代理跨你已連接工具替你完成工作的平台。

highlight.en: Connect your tools and tell Doe what you need: agents handle the boring tasks automatically, and when you do the work yourself Doe makes you faster and smarter.
highlight.zh: 連接你的工具並告訴 Doe 你的需求，代理會自動處理繁瑣任務；而當你親自動手時，Doe 也讓你更快、更聰明。

summary.en: Char is an AI notepad that finishes your to-dos for you.
summary.zh: Char 是一款會替你完成待辦事項的 AI 記事本。

highlight.en: Type a checkbox in Char and an agent picks it up, researching, drafting, or scheduling on your behalf while you stay in command.
highlight.zh: 在 Char 裡輸入一個核取方塊，代理便會接手，替你研究、撰寫草稿或安排行程，而主導權仍在你手上。

summary.en: ProcIndex is a full-stack AI accounting firm with agents that automate operations.
summary.zh: ProcIndex 是一家全棧式 AI 會計事務所，以代理自動化營運流程。

highlight.en: ProcIndex's agents automate quote-to-cash, accounts payable, and month-end close end to end, connecting to existing ERPs to make accounting teams 33% more efficient.
highlight.zh: ProcIndex 的代理端到端自動化報價到收款、應付帳款與月結流程，並串接既有 ERP，讓會計團隊效率提升 33%。

summary.en: Autosana provides AI agents for end-to-end testing across mobile and web apps.
summary.zh: Autosana 提供 AI 代理，為行動與網頁應用程式進行端到端測試。

highlight.en: Autosana creates, updates, and runs tests from your code diffs across iOS, Android, and Web, looping with coding agents until every test passes and showing video proof in PRs.
highlight.zh: Autosana 根據程式碼差異在 iOS、Android 與 Web 上建立、更新並執行測試，與編碼代理反覆迭代直到全部通過，並在 PR 中提供影片佐證。

summary.en: Omnara is a mobile and web interface for Claude Code and Codex.
summary.zh: Omnara 是 Claude Code 與 Codex 的行動與網頁介面。

highlight.en: Start a coding session on desktop and hand off seamlessly to mobile with full context, even coding hands-free by voice from anywhere.
highlight.zh: 在桌機開始編碼工作，再無縫接續到手機並保留完整脈絡，甚至能在任何地方用語音免手操作編碼。

summary.en: Socratix builds AI coworkers for fraud and risk teams at fintechs and banks.
summary.zh: Socratix 為金融科技公司與銀行的詐欺與風險團隊打造 AI 同事。

highlight.en: Socratix agents investigate alerts in real time with fast, explainable decisions, reasoning across signals like human analysts to cut fraud losses and false positives without adding headcount.
highlight.zh: Socratix 代理即時調查警示並做出快速、可解釋的決策，像人類分析師一樣跨訊號推理，在不增加人力下降低詐欺損失與誤判。

summary.en: Floot is the easiest way for non-coders to build real web apps with AI.
summary.zh: Floot 是讓非工程師用 AI 打造真實網頁應用程式最簡單的方式。

highlight.en: Unlike AI builders that cobble together developer tools and slap AI on top, Floot is purpose-built from the ground up for AI so non-coders can build serious apps without hitting a wall.
highlight.zh: 有別於那些拼湊開發者工具再套上 AI 的建構工具，Floot 從頭為 AI 量身打造，讓非工程師也能打造正式應用程式而不會卡關。

summary.en: Sira is an AI-native platform for time tracking, scheduling, payroll, and HR for hourly teams.
summary.zh: Sira 是專為時薪團隊打造的 AI 原生平台，涵蓋工時追蹤、排班、薪資與人資。

highlight.en: Sira's intelligent agents handle manual tasks like calling workers to fill open shifts, detecting timesheet anomalies, and streamlining payroll for deskless, hourly teams.
highlight.zh: Sira 的智慧代理處理繁瑣任務，如致電工人補滿空班、偵測工時表異常、簡化薪資作業，專為無辦公桌的時薪團隊服務。

summary.en: Convexia is an AI-maximalist pharma platform that uses agents to develop and sell drugs.
summary.zh: Convexia 是一個 AI 極大化的製藥平台，運用代理開發並銷售藥物。

highlight.en: Convexia runs sourcing, scientific, commercial, clinical, and probability-of-success agents to move drugs through development 10x faster and 20x leaner than incumbents.
highlight.zh: Convexia 運作採購、科學、商業、臨床與成功機率等代理，讓藥物開發比現有業者快 10 倍、精簡 20 倍。

summary.en: Locata is an AI platform that automates referral management for primary care clinics.
summary.zh: Locata 是一個自動化基層醫療診所轉診管理的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Locata's agents automate every step of the referral process, from prior authorizations to patient follow-up, addressing a gap where only half of the 100M+ US specialist referrals each year are completed.
highlight.zh: Locata 的代理自動化轉診流程的每一步，從事前授權到病患追蹤，回應美國每年逾一億筆專科轉診中僅半數完成的缺口。

summary.en: Munify is a cross-border neobank for the Middle East and its diaspora.
summary.zh: Munify 是服務中東及其僑民的跨境新型銀行。

highlight.en: From one app, users instantly open a USD account, get a virtual card, and send money home at the best rates.
highlight.zh: 使用者只需一個應用程式，即可立即開立美元帳戶、取得虛擬卡，並以最佳匯率匯款回家。

summary.en: Spotlight Realty is an AI-powered NYC brokerage that reduces residential rental commissions.
summary.zh: Spotlight Realty 是一家以 AI 驅動的紐約市仲介公司，降低住宅租賃佣金。

highlight.en: This full-service sell-side brokerage lists and markets properties, using an AI agent to screen and schedule tenant showings for a third of the normal commission.
highlight.zh: 這家全方位賣方仲介負責刊登與行銷物件，並以 AI 代理篩選與安排租客看屋，僅收一般佣金的三分之一。

summary.en: Monte is an applied research lab building continual learning for AI agents.
summary.zh: Monte 是一間應用研究實驗室，為 AI 代理打造持續學習能力。

highlight.en: Monte builds products for continual learning and recursive self-improvement, aiming to let AI agents keep getting better over time.
highlight.zh: Monte 開發持續學習與遞迴式自我改進的產品，目標是讓 AI 代理隨時間不斷進步。

summary.en: Ambral provides AI for account management and customer success.
summary.zh: Ambral 提供用於客戶管理與客戶成功的 AI。

highlight.en: Ambral synthesizes all customer activity into AI models of each account, pinpointing who needs attention and autonomously acting to drive expansions and prevent churn.
highlight.zh: Ambral 將所有客戶活動整合為每個客戶的 AI 模型，精準找出誰需要關注，並自主採取行動推動擴張與防止流失。

summary.en: Wayline is an AI voice assistant that answers calls and messages for property managers.
summary.zh: Wayline 是為物業管理者接聽電話與訊息的 AI 語音助理。

highlight.en: Wayline acts as an always-on AI front desk for real estate, set up in 24 hours, with a domain-specific knowledge base that handles complex workflows and replaces robo-menus and call centers.
highlight.zh: Wayline 是房地產業全天候運作的 AI 前台，24 小時內即可設定，具備領域專屬知識庫以處理複雜流程，並取代語音選單與客服中心。

summary.en: Bitrig lets you vibe code, test, and deploy native Swift apps from your iPhone.
summary.zh: Bitrig 讓你直接從 iPhone 隨興編碼、測試並部署原生 Swift 應用程式。

highlight.en: Bitrig is the only vibe coder that writes native Swift, built by the creators of SwiftUI who led its development for a decade, plus an Apple Design Award winner.
highlight.zh: Bitrig 是唯一能撰寫原生 Swift 的隨興編碼工具，由領導 SwiftUI 開發十年的創造者及一位 Apple 設計大獎得主打造。

summary.en: EffiGov is building an AI operating system for local governments and cities.
summary.zh: EffiGov 正在為地方政府與城市打造 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: EffiGov starts with AI call operators that answer 311 and departmental lines 24/7, handling everything from permit applications to animal control.
highlight.zh: EffiGov 從 AI 話務員起步，全天候接聽 311 與各部門專線，處理從許可申請到動物管制的各種事務。

summary.en: Design Arena is the world's largest crowdsourced benchmark for AI-generated design.
summary.zh: Design Arena 是全球最大的 AI 生成設計群眾外包基準平台。

highlight.en: Design Arena crowdsources human judgments to benchmark and compare the quality of AI-generated design at scale.
highlight.zh: Design Arena 透過群眾外包蒐集人類評判，大規模衡量並比較 AI 生成設計的品質。

summary.en: DeepGrove brings frontier AI intelligence to any device.
summary.zh: DeepGrove 將前沿 AI 智慧帶到任何裝置上。

highlight.en: DeepGrove focuses on delivering frontier-grade AI capabilities that can run directly on any device rather than relying on the cloud.
highlight.zh: DeepGrove 專注於提供可直接在任何裝置上運行的前沿級 AI 能力，而非仰賴雲端。

summary.en: Tesora builds AI agents for actuaries at P&C carriers, reinsurers, and MGAs.
summary.zh: Tesora 為產險業者、再保險公司與 MGA 的精算師打造 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Tesora's agentic workbench ingests loss runs and filings to build, audit, and deploy raters with a SOX-grade audit trail, replacing the spreadsheet-and-email assembly between an actuarial idea and a deployed rate.
highlight.zh: Tesora 的代理工作台匯入損失紀錄與申報文件，建立、稽核並部署費率工具，並附 SOX 級稽核軌跡，取代精算構想到費率上線之間的試算表與郵件流程。

summary.en: Pangolin is an open-source, identity-aware VPN and proxy for secure remote access.
summary.zh: Pangolin 是開源、具身分感知的 VPN 與代理，用於安全的遠端存取。

highlight.en: Built on WireGuard, Pangolin provides identity-based remote access that enables secure, seamless connectivity to both private and public resources.
highlight.zh: Pangolin 建構於 WireGuard 之上，提供以身分為基礎的遠端存取，能安全且無縫地連接私有與公開資源。

summary.en: Slashy is an AI email assistant that helps you fly through your inbox.
summary.zh: Slashy 是一款 AI 電子郵件助理，幫你飛快處理收件匣。

highlight.en: Positioned as Cursor for email, Slashy uses AI to help users move through their inbox far faster.
highlight.zh: Slashy 定位為「電子郵件版的 Cursor」，運用 AI 協助使用者更快地處理收件匣。

summary.en: Nexa Labs builds implantable microchips and AI for cattle health monitoring.
summary.zh: Nexa Labs 打造用於牛隻健康監測的植入式微晶片與 AI。

highlight.en: Nexa's implantable chips collect richer biometrics than rivals, powering an AI animal-health engine for early disease detection, reproductive insights, and GPS tracking while building the world's largest cattle health dataset.
highlight.zh: Nexa 的植入式晶片蒐集比同業更豐富的生物特徵，驅動 AI 動物健康引擎進行早期疾病偵測、繁殖洞察與 GPS 追蹤，同時建立全球最大的牛隻健康資料集。

summary.en: BootLoop is an AI agent that writes and tests firmware on real hardware.
summary.zh: BootLoop 是一個能在實體硬體上撰寫並測試韌體的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Where existing AI coding assistants fail at embedded systems, BootLoop ingests datasheets, schematics, and design files to write firmware in your style and auto-test it on your hardware.
highlight.zh: 在現有 AI 編碼助理對嵌入式系統束手無策之處，BootLoop 匯入資料表、電路圖與設計檔，以你的風格撰寫韌體並在你的硬體上自動測試。

summary.en: Theora is auditable AI that synthesizes pharmaceutical evidence for regulators and payors.
summary.zh: Theora 是可稽核的 AI，為監管機構與付款方整合製藥證據。

highlight.en: Theora synthesizes fragmented pharma and device data to prove safety, optimize market access, and anticipate regulatory response 10x faster, ensuring approved drugs reach patients.
highlight.zh: Theora 整合零散的製藥與醫材資料，以快 10 倍的速度證明安全性、優化市場准入並預測監管回應，確保獲批藥物能送達病患。

summary.en: Trace is a workflow orchestration platform for context-aware collaboration between humans and AI.
summary.zh: Trace 是一個工作流程編排平台，實現人類與 AI 之間具脈絡感知的協作。

highlight.en: Trace gives agents shared context across systems and automatically identifies which tasks can be AI-automated versus need human input, letting non-technical teams build and run workflows without engineers.
highlight.zh: Trace 讓代理跨系統共享脈絡，並自動判斷哪些任務可由 AI 自動化、哪些需人工介入，使非技術團隊無需工程師也能建立並運行工作流程。

summary.en: VibeFlow generates full-stack web apps from prompts with visual backend workflows.
summary.zh: VibeFlow 從提示詞生成全棧網頁應用程式，並提供視覺化的後端工作流程。

highlight.en: Unlike tools like Lovable or v0 where backends stay closed black boxes, VibeFlow opens up backend logic with n8n-style visual workflows that are editable and prompt-friendly.
highlight.zh: 有別於 Lovable 或 v0 把後端封閉成黑盒子，VibeFlow 以 n8n 風格的視覺化工作流程開放後端邏輯，使其可編輯且易於用提示詞調整。

summary.en: Phases deploys AI agents for automated clinical trial oversight and execution.
summary.zh: Phases 部署 AI 代理進行臨床試驗的自動化監督與執行。

highlight.en: Phases' agents oversee trials by identifying risks and autonomously taking action to resolve issues, improving operational performance, data quality, and audit readiness.
highlight.zh: Phases 的代理透過辨識風險並自主採取行動解決問題來監督試驗，提升營運表現、資料品質與稽核準備度。

summary.en: Perseus Defense builds mass-manufactured counter-drone systems for US defense agencies.
summary.zh: Perseus Defense 為美國國防機構打造可量產的反無人機系統。

highlight.en: Perseus's man-portable, multi-domain self-guided missile platform senses, engages, and eliminates drone threats at drastically lower cost per engagement than existing kinetic solutions.
highlight.zh: Perseus 的單兵攜帶、多領域自導飛彈平台能感測、接戰並消滅無人機威脅，且每次接戰成本遠低於現有的動能解決方案。

summary.en: Minimal AI builds AI customer support teams for e-commerce brands.
summary.zh: Minimal AI 為電商品牌打造 AI 客服團隊。

highlight.en: Minimal AI lets e-commerce brands build and manage AI support teams that resolve over 90% of tickets while increasing revenue.
highlight.zh: Minimal AI 讓電商品牌建立並管理 AI 客服團隊，能解決逾 90% 的工單，同時提升營收。

summary.en: Maximal builds autonomous systems to plan and move freight at machine precision.
summary.zh: Maximal 打造自主系統，以機器級精準度規劃並運送貨物。

highlight.en: Maximal's context-aware load-planning agents plug into a full-truckload carrier's ERPs and communications to generate optimized plans, earning more revenue-per-mile with less planning time.
highlight.zh: Maximal 具脈絡感知的裝載規劃代理串接整車運輸業者的 ERP 與通訊管道，生成最佳化裝載計畫，以更少的規劃時間賺取更高的每英里營收。

summary.en: Nautilus is an AI platform to grow and optimize car washes.
summary.zh: Nautilus 是用於成長與優化洗車業務的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Nautilus replaces expensive legacy car-wash systems with mobile-first e-commerce, membership management, and automated marketing.
highlight.zh: Nautilus 以行動優先的電商、會員管理與自動化行銷，取代昂貴的洗車業老舊系統。

summary.en: Avelis Health audits medical claims in real time for self-insured employers and health plans.
summary.zh: Avelis Health 為自我保險的雇主與健康保險方即時稽核醫療理賠。

highlight.en: After helping 60 patients erase over $300K in bills, Avelis moved upstream with machine-learning models that audit every claim to stop bad payments before they happen, tackling $60B+ in annual waste.
highlight.zh: 在協助 60 名病患消除逾 30 萬美元帳單後，Avelis 往上游發展，以機器學習模型稽核每筆理賠、在錯誤付款發生前攔截，對應每年逾 600 億美元的浪費。

summary.en: PARES AI is an AI-native real estate services firm for brokerage and property management.
summary.zh: PARES AI 是一家 AI 原生的房地產服務公司，提供仲介與物業管理。

highlight.en: PARES uses AI to centralize labor-intensive real estate services like prospecting, underwriting, and tenant communication, delivering them better, faster, and at a fraction of the cost.
highlight.zh: PARES 運用 AI 集中處理勞力密集的房地產服務，如招攬賣方、估價分析與租客溝通，以更好、更快且僅一小部分的成本交付。

summary.en: Opennote is a notebook with an AI thinking partner built in.
summary.zh: Opennote 是一款內建 AI 思考夥伴的記事本。

highlight.en: Opennote's AI, Feynman, lives in your work, editing your writing, referencing your knowledge and the web, running background tasks, and giving feedback as you go.
highlight.zh: Opennote 的 AI「Feynman」融入你的工作中，能編輯你的文字、引用你的知識與網路資料、執行背景任務，並在你工作時即時給予回饋。

summary.en: Pally is an intelligent unified inbox and personal CRM across all your messaging apps.
summary.zh: Pally 是一個橫跨所有訊息應用程式的智慧統一收件匣與個人 CRM。

highlight.en: Pally brings every message from Slack, iMessage, and WhatsApp into one Superhuman-like experience, with AI agents that automatically complete your action items.
highlight.zh: Pally 將 Slack、iMessage、WhatsApp 等各平台訊息匯整成一個類 Superhuman 的體驗，並以 AI 代理自動完成你的待辦事項。

summary.en: Rebulk accurately measures and monitors bulk inventory using cameras, LiDAR, and computer vision.
summary.zh: Rebulk 運用相機、光達與電腦視覺，精準測量並監控散裝庫存。

highlight.en: Rebulk tracks piles of feed, sand, and other bulk assets that don't fit into boxes and barcodes, replacing rough estimates and manual checks that cause shrink, stockouts, and bad planning.
highlight.zh: Rebulk 追蹤飼料、砂石等無法裝箱貼條碼的散裝資產，取代造成損耗、缺貨與規劃失準的粗略估算與人工盤點。

summary.en: Modelence is a batteries-included platform for building production-ready apps with AI.
summary.zh: Modelence 是一個功能齊備的平台，用 AI 打造可上線的應用程式。

highlight.en: From founders who built a $500M platform for Meta and Netflix, Modelence is an open-source framework that bundles auth, database, hosting, cron, and monitoring so non-developers ship real production apps, not just prototypes.
highlight.zh: Modelence 由曾為 Meta 與 Netflix 打造 5 億美元平台的創辦人開發，是一個開源框架，整合認證、資料庫、託管、排程與監控，讓非開發者也能交付正式應用程式而不只是原型。

summary.en: NOSO Labs builds AI agents that help field technicians diagnose and sell better.
summary.zh: NOSO Labs 打造 AI 代理，協助現場技術人員更好地診斷與銷售。

highlight.en: In home services, few technicians excel at diagnosing, selling, and paperwork alike, so NOSO's agents improve diagnostic accuracy and help capture sales opportunities.
highlight.zh: 在居家服務業中，鮮少有技術人員能同時擅長診斷、銷售與文書作業，因此 NOSO 的代理協助提升診斷準確度並把握銷售機會。

summary.en: Avent provides AI agents for industrial commerce, automating quoting and order entry.
summary.zh: Avent 為工業商務提供 AI 代理，自動化報價與訂單輸入。

highlight.en: Avent's agents manage sales inboxes, build quotes from past pricing and tribal knowledge, and keep records updated in existing ERPs for manufacturers and distributors.
highlight.zh: Avent 的代理管理銷售收件匣，依過往定價與內隱知識建立報價，並在製造商與經銷商既有的 ERP 中更新紀錄。

summary.en: Burnt is an agentic operating system for the food supply chain.
summary.zh: Burnt 是食品供應鏈的代理式作業系統。

highlight.en: Rather than replacing legacy ERPs, Burnt's agent Ozai runs them, automating order management by monitoring emails, calls, and faxes and learning each customer's habits and shorthand.
highlight.zh: Burnt 不取代老舊 ERP，而是以代理「Ozai」來運行它們，透過監控郵件、電話與傳真並學習每位客戶的習慣與簡寫來自動化訂單管理。

summary.en: Uplift AI builds foundational voice models for regional languages.
summary.zh: Uplift AI 為各地區語言打造基礎語音模型。

highlight.en: Uplift gathers its own data and trains its own models for languages like Urdu and Bengali, enabling voice-first services that could onboard hundreds of millions of new users.
highlight.zh: Uplift 自行蒐集資料並訓練如烏爾都語、孟加拉語等語言的模型，讓語音優先的服務得以上線，有望帶入數億名新使用者。

summary.en: Paloma drives digital transformation for real-economy businesses with custom AI software.
summary.zh: Paloma 以客製化 AI 軟體推動實體經濟企業的數位轉型。

highlight.en: Paloma gives manufacturing companies an embedded team of engineers and ops experts who replace manual operations with custom, AI-native software.
highlight.zh: Paloma 為製造業公司提供一支內嵌的工程師與營運專家團隊，以客製化的 AI 原生軟體取代人工作業。

summary.en: Autumn is open-source billing infrastructure over Stripe for AI startups.
summary.zh: Autumn 是建構於 Stripe 之上、為 AI 新創打造的開源計費基礎設施。

highlight.en: Autumn lets startups build usage-based, credit, and subscription pricing in just 3 functions with no webhooks, handling versioning, migrations, and custom pricing as they scale.
highlight.zh: Autumn 讓新創僅用 3 個函式、無需 webhook 就能建立用量計費、點數與訂閱方案，並在規模擴張時處理版本控管、遷移與客製化定價。

summary.en: Synthetic Society creates synthetic users to simulate real users.
summary.zh: Synthetic Society 建立合成使用者來模擬真實使用者。

highlight.en: Synthetic Society generates synthetic users that mimic real user behavior, enabling teams to simulate and test how real people would respond.
highlight.zh: Synthetic Society 生成模仿真實使用者行為的合成使用者，讓團隊得以模擬並測試真人會如何反應。

summary.en: Meteor is an AI-native browser that can do your work for you.
summary.zh: Meteor 是一款能替你完成工作的 AI 原生瀏覽器。

highlight.en: A Chrome alternative, Meteor uses your browser session to let agents act as personal assistants, booking calendars, finding cheaper flights, chatting with any page, and integrating Gmail and Calendar.
highlight.zh: 作為 Chrome 的替代品，Meteor 運用你的瀏覽器工作階段，讓代理化身個人助理，能安排行事曆、尋找更便宜的機票、與任何網頁對話，並整合 Gmail 與行事曆。

summary.en: Closera is an AI shopping agent for your e-commerce store.
summary.zh: Closera 是為你的電商商店打造的 AI 購物代理。

highlight.en: Closera adds an AI shopping agent to e-commerce stores to guide shoppers and help them find and buy products.
highlight.zh: Closera 為電商商店加入 AI 購物代理，引導購物者並協助他們找到並購買商品。

summary.en: MangoDesk builds long-horizon RL environments for real-world AI workflows.
summary.zh: MangoDesk 為真實世界的 AI 工作流程打造長程強化學習環境。

highlight.en: MangoDesk helps AI get better at real-world workflows through production-grade reinforcement learning environments.
highlight.zh: MangoDesk 透過正式級別的強化學習環境，幫助 AI 在真實世界工作流程上表現更佳。

summary.en: gitdot is building a better GitHub.
summary.zh: gitdot 正在打造一個更好的 GitHub。

highlight.en: gitdot reimagines the code hosting and collaboration experience as a better alternative to GitHub.
highlight.zh: gitdot 重新構想程式碼託管與協作體驗，打造比 GitHub 更好的替代方案。

summary.en: Liva AI collects targeted audio and video training data for model labs.
summary.zh: Liva AI 為模型實驗室蒐集針對性的音訊與影片訓練資料。

highlight.en: Because speech models trained on internet data still lack realism, Liva collects targeted training data for model labs to make AI feel more human.
highlight.zh: 由於以網路資料訓練的語音模型仍缺乏真實感，Liva 為模型實驗室蒐集針對性的訓練資料，讓 AI 更貼近真人。

summary.en: Playgent provides high-fidelity sandbox environments for testing AI agents.
summary.zh: Playgent 提供高擬真的沙盒環境，用於測試 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Playgent packages sandboxes as a single MCP URL with mocked tool calls and natural-language test data, letting teams reproduce production agent failures in safe, scoped environments and export OTel traces.
highlight.zh: Playgent 將沙盒封裝為單一 MCP 網址，內含模擬的工具呼叫與自然語言測試資料，讓團隊在安全、受限的環境中重現代理在生產環境的失敗，並匯出 OTel 追蹤資料。

summary.en: LLM Stats is an independent AI evaluations lab and LLM leaderboard.
summary.zh: LLM Stats 是一間獨立的 AI 評測實驗室與大型語言模型排行榜。

highlight.en: LLM Stats builds contamination-proof benchmarks and maintains the most complete archive of LLM results, running independent evaluations not already in models' training data.
highlight.zh: LLM Stats 建立防污染的基準測試，並維護最完整的大型語言模型成績檔案，執行不在多數模型訓練資料中的獨立評測。

summary.en: ContextFort gives security teams visibility and controls for AI browser agents.
summary.zh: ContextFort 為資安團隊提供對 AI 瀏覽器代理的可視性與管控。

highlight.en: ContextFort is a Chrome extension that detects when an AI agent takes control of the browser, records every action, and prevents risky actions and cross-site data leakage.
highlight.zh: ContextFort 是一個 Chrome 擴充功能，能偵測 AI 代理何時接管瀏覽器、記錄每個動作，並防止高風險操作與跨站資料外洩。

summary.en: Datafruit is an AI workspace for software implementation and delivery teams.
summary.zh: Datafruit 是一個為軟體導入與交付團隊打造的 AI 工作空間。

highlight.en: Datafruit's AI agents capture every customer conversation, structure project scope from day one, and learn from past projects to make each engagement sharper and more profitable.
highlight.zh: Datafruit 的 AI 代理擷取每段客戶對話，從第一天就建立專案範圍架構，並從過往專案中學習，讓每次合作更精準、更具獲利。

summary.en: Topological builds physics-based foundation models for CAD optimization.
summary.zh: Topological 打造基於物理的基礎模型，用於 CAD 優化。

highlight.en: Topological's UToP-v1 topology optimization model understands physics, geometry, and manufacturability, generating optimal designs with under 5% compliance error and 1930x faster than current methods.
highlight.zh: Topological 的 UToP-v1 拓撲優化模型理解物理、幾何與可製造性，能生成最佳設計，順度誤差低於 5%，且比現行方法快 1930 倍。

summary.en: Lotas builds AI assistants for data science and 3D work.
summary.zh: Lotas 打造用於資料科學與 3D 工作的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Lotas's first product, Rao, is an AI coding assistant inside RStudio, the IDE used by up to 5 million R data scientists, able to read, write, and edit code with full context awareness.
highlight.zh: Lotas 的首款產品 Rao 是內建於 RStudio 的 AI 編碼助理，RStudio 是多達 500 萬名 R 語言資料科學家使用的 IDE，Rao 能在完整脈絡感知下讀取、撰寫與編輯程式碼。

summary.en: Monarcha is an AI georeferencing platform that turns maps into queryable spatial data.
summary.zh: Monarcha 是一個 AI 地理參照平台，把地圖轉成可查詢的空間資料。

highlight.en: Built for mining, infrastructure, and land teams, Monarcha aligns scanned maps, plats, and survey drawings to real-world coordinates, producing a queryable GIS layer in 90 seconds or less.
highlight.zh: Monarcha 專為採礦、基礎建設與土地團隊打造，能將掃描地圖、地籍圖與測量圖對齊到真實世界座標，在 90 秒內產出可查詢的 GIS 圖層。

summary.en: Orange Slice is an agentic spreadsheet for sales enrichment where AI writes every column.
summary.zh: Orange Slice 是一款用於銷售資料補強的代理式試算表，每個欄位都由 AI 撰寫。

highlight.en: Describe what you want in chat and Orange Slice generates TypeScript columns across thousands of rows, with 100+ built-in enrichments like LinkedIn, contact info, and web scraping that run in dependency order.
highlight.zh: 在對話中描述需求，Orange Slice 便會生成 TypeScript 欄位並套用到數千列，內建逾 100 種補強功能，如 LinkedIn、聯絡資訊與網頁爬取，並依相依順序執行。

summary.en: Nuntius worked on making AI models reliably follow rules.
summary.zh: Nuntius 致力於讓 AI 模型可靠地遵循規則。

highlight.en: Nuntius focused on the alignment needed for economically productive AI, aiming for bulletproof rule-following in real-world use cases.
highlight.zh: Nuntius 專注於具經濟生產力的 AI 所需的對齊問題，目標是在真實世界用例中達成無懈可擊的規則遵循。

summary.en: Cyberdesk is a self-learning computer-use agent for developers to automate desktop workflows.
summary.zh: Cyberdesk 是一個自我學習的電腦操作代理，讓開發者自動化桌面工作流程。

highlight.en: Cyberdesk memorizes tasks and repeats them quickly while adapting to unexpected popups and crashes, already in production creating appointments in EHR apps and processing files in legacy ERPs.
highlight.zh: Cyberdesk 能記住任務並快速重複執行，同時適應突發的彈出視窗與當機，目前已在生產環境中於電子病歷應用程式建立預約，並在老舊 ERP 中處理檔案。

summary.en: Alter is a zero-trust identity and access control platform built for AI agents.
summary.zh: Alter 是一個專為 AI 代理打造的零信任身分與存取控制平台。

highlight.en: Alter verifies every agent tool call at the parameter level with ephemeral, least-privilege access, blocking unsafe actions like a rogue DROP TABLE or over-limit payment before they touch production.
highlight.zh: Alter 在參數層級驗證每次代理工具呼叫，採用短效、最小權限的存取，並在如失控的 DROP TABLE 或超額付款等危險操作影響生產環境前加以阻擋。

summary.en: Async builds frontier AI agents for service businesses like law firms and clinics.
summary.zh: Async 為律師事務所、診所等服務型企業打造前沿 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Async builds frontier AI agents tailored to service businesses including law firms, healthcare clinics, and real estate companies.
highlight.zh: Async 為服務型企業量身打造前沿 AI 代理，涵蓋律師事務所、醫療診所與房地產公司。

summary.en: Frizzle uses AI to grade handwritten math assignments and generate analytics for teachers.
summary.zh: Frizzle 運用 AI 批改手寫數學作業，並為教師生成分析報告。

highlight.en: Teachers spend over 10 hours a week grading; Frizzle does it in minutes and turns everyday work into real-time insight, and was named an official White House AI Education Partner.
highlight.zh: 教師每週花逾 10 小時批改作業，Frizzle 幾分鐘就能完成，並把日常作業轉化為即時洞察，更獲選為白宮官方 AI 教育合作夥伴。

summary.en: Magnitude is a coding agent for open models that runs anywhere.
summary.zh: Magnitude 是一款能在任何地方運行、支援開源模型的編碼代理。

highlight.en: Magnitude delivers the full Claude Code experience on open models, running anywhere from its own infra to fully air-gapped deployments in your data center.
highlight.zh: Magnitude 在開源模型上提供完整的 Claude Code 體驗，可在任何地方運行，從自家基礎設施到你資料中心內完全隔離網路的部署皆可。

summary.en: Stockline is an AI-native ERP for food wholesalers.
summary.zh: Stockline 是一款為食品批發商打造的 AI 原生 ERP。

highlight.en: Stockline's agents eliminate repetitive human labor starting with order entry, aiming to replace clunky software with next-generation ERPs built around AI employees.
highlight.zh: Stockline 的代理從訂單輸入開始消除重複性的人力工作，目標是以圍繞 AI 員工打造的新一代 ERP 取代笨重的舊軟體。

summary.en: DeepAware AI delivers robots, parts, and RL environments in 72 hours or for SF pickup.
summary.zh: DeepAware AI 在 72 小時內配送機器人、零件與強化學習環境，或於舊金山自取。

highlight.en: Beyond fast hardware delivery, DeepAware helps teams collect teleoperation data, build RL environments, and deploy robots into production, serving AI labs and industrial operations.
highlight.zh: 除了快速配送硬體，DeepAware 還協助團隊蒐集遠端操作資料、建立強化學習環境，並將機器人部署到生產環境，服務對象包括 AI 實驗室與工業營運單位。

summary.en: Kestroll is an early-stage Summer 2025 Y Combinator company.
summary.zh: Kestroll 是一家處於早期階段的 2025 年夏季梯次 Y Combinator 公司。

highlight.en: Kestroll is a Summer 2025 YC startup whose product details have not yet been publicly disclosed.
highlight.zh: Kestroll 是 2025 年夏季梯次的 YC 新創公司，其產品細節尚未公開揭露。

summary.en: CareSwift is a real-time AI scribe built into ambulance reporting systems.
summary.zh: CareSwift 是內建於救護車報告系統的即時 AI 文書助理。

highlight.en: CareSwift guides medics as they document care and instantly flags errors, letting crews finish compliant reports in under three minutes, cutting documentation time by 80% and avoiding claim denials.
highlight.zh: CareSwift 在醫護人員記錄照護時提供引導並即時標示錯誤，讓救護人員在三分鐘內完成合規報告，將文書時間縮短 80% 並避免理賠被拒。

summary.en: Wedge is an operating system to deploy, govern, and scale AI agents in healthcare.
summary.zh: Wedge 是一個在醫療領域部署、治理並擴展 AI 代理的作業系統。

highlight.en: Positioned as Palantir for healthcare AI agents, Wedge provides the operating system to deploy, govern, and scale AI agents across healthcare organizations.
highlight.zh: Wedge 定位為「醫療 AI 代理界的 Palantir」，提供作業系統以在醫療機構間部署、治理並擴展 AI 代理。

summary.en: Panoptive is a continuous oversight engine for clinical trials.
summary.zh: Panoptive 是臨床試驗的持續監督引擎。

highlight.en: Panoptive turns unstructured monitoring data into structured deviation, safety, and quality findings, building an audit-ready oversight trail and spotting systemic patterns across sites before they compound.
highlight.zh: Panoptive 將非結構化的監測資料轉化為結構化的偏差、安全與品質發現，建立可供稽核的監督軌跡，並在問題擴大前跨試驗中心找出系統性模式。

summary.en: Stellon Labs builds tiny frontier AI models that run on edge devices.
summary.zh: Stellon Labs 打造可在邊緣裝置上運行的微型前沿 AI 模型。

highlight.en: Stellon's open-source models target smartphones, wearables, and embedded systems; its first model, KittenTTS, got 8K GitHub stars and 45K downloads within two weeks of launch.
highlight.zh: Stellon 的開源模型鎖定智慧型手機、穿戴裝置與嵌入式系統；其首款模型 KittenTTS 在發布兩週內就獲得 8 千個 GitHub 星標與 4.5 萬次下載。

summary.en: Kalinda uses AI for deep research to help class action law firms qualify cases.
summary.zh: Kalinda 運用 AI 進行深度研究，協助集體訴訟律師事務所篩選案件。

highlight.en: Kalinda extracts and aggregates data buried in thousands of pages of medical and financial records, giving firms the equivalent of hundreds of paralegals to qualify claimants in hours instead of months.
highlight.zh: Kalinda 從數千頁醫療與財務紀錄中萃取並彙整資料，為事務所提供相當於數百名法律助理的人力，將篩選原告的時間從數月縮短至數小時。

summary.en: Parachute is infrastructure for hospitals to safely monitor and deploy clinical AI.
summary.zh: Parachute 是讓醫院安全監控並部署臨床 AI 的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Parachute vets AI tools, runs state-of-the-art evaluations, monitors every model for drift and compliance, and locks every decision in an immutable audit trail.
highlight.zh: Parachute 審查 AI 工具、執行頂尖評估、監測每個模型的漂移與合規狀況，並將每個決策封存於不可竄改的稽核軌跡中。

summary.en: IronLedger.ai automates property accounting with AI corporate cards and invoice processing.
summary.zh: IronLedger.ai 以 AI 企業卡與發票處理自動化物業會計。

highlight.en: Starting with accounts payable, IronLedger automates property accounting for managers, developers, and contractors, eliminating over $70K in annual accounting costs across 50K+ multifamily units.
highlight.zh: IronLedger 從應付帳款著手，為物業管理者、開發商與承包商自動化物業會計，在逾 5 萬個多戶住宅單位中每年省下超過 7 萬美元的會計成本。

summary.en: Interface researches how the world gets encoded for agents and builds OneStop, a unified AI market.
summary.zh: Interface 研究世界如何為代理編碼，並打造統一的 AI 市場 OneStop。

highlight.en: Interface studies how the world gets encoded for agents and builds the interfaces they transact through, with its latest work, OneStop, being a unified market for AI.
highlight.zh: Interface 研究世界如何為代理編碼，並打造代理進行交易的介面，其最新作品 OneStop 是一個統一的 AI 市場。

summary.en: Fulcrum is an agentic debugger that red-teams and fixes AI systems.
summary.zh: Fulcrum 是一個代理式除錯工具，透過紅隊測試來修正 AI 系統。

highlight.en: Fulcrum builds red-teaming agents that help developers fix their RL environments and improve their agents, for customers tired of being bullshitted by their own agents.
highlight.zh: Fulcrum 打造紅隊測試代理，協助開發者修正其強化學習環境並改善代理，服務那些受夠了被自家代理唬弄的客戶。

summary.en: b12 Labs is an AI chemical copilot for pharma and biotech drug discovery.
summary.zh: b12 Labs 是用於製藥與生技藥物探索的 AI 化學副駕駛。

highlight.en: Like a GPS for chemistry, b12 plans recipes for new molecules to accelerate early-stage drug discovery from years to months, built by a Nature-published, Olympiad-champion founding team running paid big-pharma pilots.
highlight.zh: b12 宛如化學界的 GPS，為新分子規劃合成配方，把早期藥物探索從數年縮短至數月，由曾在《Nature》發表論文、奧林匹亞冠軍的創辦團隊打造，並與大藥廠進行付費試點。

summary.en: Costream indexes human dialogue through digital products.
summary.zh: Costream 透過數位產品為人類對話建立索引。

highlight.en: Costream focuses on capturing and indexing human dialogue by embedding it within digital products.
highlight.zh: Costream 專注於透過將人類對話嵌入數位產品來擷取並建立其索引。
